task_description: Compress all files in the selected folder into a ZIP archive.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the 'Data (D:)' drive entry in the left navigation pane of File Explorer; it is a sidebar item with a drive/computer icon and a light highlight, so the target is a UI control in the navigation area. In the full-screen view, Windows File Explorer is open to the main folder view, with the left sidebar listing locations such as WPS云盘, 此电脑, Windows-SSL, Data (D:), and 网络. The current window displays folders and recent files in the main pane.
caption.action: Click the 'Data (D:)' item in the left navigation pane.
caption.expectation: The Data (D:) drive should become selected and its contents should load in the main File Explorer pane.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the row for a folder named 'Everything'. The row is highlighted in blue, and the item has a standard yellow folder icon to the left, indicating the target is a folder entry in the file list rather than blank space or editable text. In the full-screen File Explorer window, the current location is Data (D:), with many folders listed in details view; 'Everything' is already selected in the main pane.
caption.action: Double-click the 'Everything' folder entry in the main file list.
caption.expectation: The 'Everything' folder should open, and File Explorer should display its contents.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop frames the entire File Explorer window because this is a keyboard shortcut action. The window title shows the folder name 'Everything'. In the main file list, five items are visible in details view: 'Changes.txt', 'Everything.exe', 'Everything.ini', 'License.txt', and 'Uninstall.exe'. No text entry field is active, and no characters are being typed; this hotkey would apply to the currently focused file list and select all visible items rather than entering text. In the full-screen view, File Explorer is open at 此电脑 > Data (D:) > Everything, with the left navigation pane showing Data (D:) selected and the search box on the upper right labeled '在 Everything 中搜索'.
caption.action: Press Ctrl+A to select all items in the current folder.
caption.expectation: All visible files in the 'Everything' folder should become highlighted as selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the selected row for 'License.txt', a text document item in the file list. The row is highlighted blue along with the other files, so the right-click is occurring on an already selected object rather than on blank space. In the full-screen view, File Explorer is open to 此电脑 > Data (D:) > Everything, and all five items in the folder are selected: 'Changes.txt', 'Everything.exe', 'Everything.ini', 'License.txt', and 'Uninstall.exe'. No context menu is visible yet, so the click is on the selected files area and should open an object context menu with file actions such as open, cut/copy, delete, rename, compression/sharing, properties, and view/sort related options.
caption.action: Right-click the selected 'License.txt' row in the file list.
caption.expectation: A context menu for the selected files should appear next to the selection, showing actions that apply to the selected items.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the second item in a cascading submenu. The targeted item has a small archive box icon and the label 添加到 "Everything.zip", indicating the command to add the selected files into a ZIP archive named Everything.zip. In the full-screen view, File Explorer is open to 此电脑 > Data (D:) > Everything with five files selected. A right-click context menu is open, the 360压缩 submenu is expanded to the right, and the click target is a menu command rather than a file or blank area.
caption.action: Click the submenu item labeled 添加到 "Everything.zip".
caption.expectation: The submenu should close and the compression tool should begin creating a ZIP archive named Everything.zip from the selected files.
